title: guillenia lasiophylla
intro: Guillenia lasiophylla, also known as the hairy whitetop or hairy meadow-queen, is a perennial herb in the mustard family native to the western United States and Canada. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Guillenia lasiophylla include its potential to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of bronchitis. Traditional herbal preparations of Guillenia lasiophylla include infusions and decoctions made from its leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves.
